title: 6-Minute NERDx Talks by Comedians
full_description: Comedians deliver micro presentations with a twist. Each PowerPoint has exactly 18 slides, and each slide advances automatically after 20 seconds. Every day, a fresh lineup gives TED-inspired geeky seminars on science, history, tapirs or whatever nerdy passion they have. Expect nudibranchs, the Titanic, haggis and Pokémon. This educational mini conference’s final talk is a mystery slideshow, where comedians improvise as “experts” on slides they’ve never seen before. Check Instagram for each day’s TikTok TED talks and speakers.
